name: Franklin Security & Limo Svc
recent_news: Owner Kevin Franklin runs Franklin Security LLC in Bend providing event/personal/nightclub security; limo appears to be a minor adjunct line. Featured in 2020 Bend Bulletin cougar-sighting story while patrolling.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus contractor; primary business is security services with limousine as side offering. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Loving Lift Transportation
recent_news: Veteran-owned NEMT operator based in Madras, OR; contracts with Medicaid brokers (LogistiCare, PacificSource) and Cascades East Ride Center for non-emergency medical rides. No school-bus contract evidence.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT micro-operator, not a school transportation contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: V & K Limousine Svc
recent_news: Listed as a Stafford County VA business; not to be confused with K&V Limousine Services of MD/DC (which is a separate, larger group-transport firm). No public evidence of school district contracts.
fit_notes: Two-person limo at a residential address; no school-bus operations. Stafford County PS runs its own 300+ bus fleet in-house. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Kehns Limousine
recent_news: New Ulm Public Schools transportation is contracted to New Ulm Bus Lines (not Kehns); Minnesota Valley Lutheran uses Palmer Bus Service. No web/news footprint found for Kehns Limousine in school transport.
fit_notes: Appears to be a small classic limo operator at a residential New Ulm address; no school-bus contracting evidence. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: White Night Limousine
recent_news: Vancouver, WA school transportation is run in-house by Vancouver Public Schools (162 buses) and specialized SPED rides by ESD 112 (78 buses). No record of White Night Limousine holding school-bus contracts; appears to be prom/party-style livery.
fit_notes: Two-person residential-address limo; no school-bus operating footprint. Not a Summit tuck-in target.
